header.description: Load data from previous step in the workflow

notice.displayName: This will load data from a previous step in the workflow. Example

json.description: Process JSON data from previous step in the workflow

binary.description: Process binary data from previous step in the workflow

allInputData.description: Use all JSON data that flows into the parent agent or chain

expressionData.description: Load a subset of data, and/or data from any previous step in the workflow

allInputData.description: Use all Binary data that flows into the parent agent or chain

specificField.description: Load data from a specific field in the parent agent or chain

auto.description: Uses the mime type to detect the format

jsonData.description: Drag and drop fields from the input pane, or use an expression

binaryDataKey.description: The name of the field in the agent or chain’s input that contains the binary file to be processed

simple.description: Splits every 1000 characters with a 200 character overlap

pointers.description: Pointers to extract from JSON, e.g. "/text" or "/text, /meta/title"

splitPages.description: Whether to split PDF pages into separate documents

metadata.description: Metadata to add to each document. Could be used for filtering during retrieval
